name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series long wallet, leather wallet, featuring brand's iconic double G accessories, made of calfskin, hot-pressed process presents wild boar texture, granular touch, unique. Black non-metal tanned leather double G, 12 card slots, 4 bill slots, ID window.
name_cn:
【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series long wallet, leather wallet, featuring brand's iconic double G accessories, made of calfskin, hot-pressed process presents wild boar texture, granular touch, unique. Black non-metal tanned leather double G, 12 card slots, 4 bill slots, ID window.
Model: 436023.
Open dimensions: 18.2(W) x 17.5cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 9(W) x 17.5cm(H) x 2cm(D)
Color: Black/Full leather.
Brass hardware
Made in Italy
